overview: Chicago Anti-Aging Institute is a multidisciplinary clinic in Lockport, IL that treats chronic pain, musculoskeletal conditions, and hormone irregularities through Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) and advanced restorative treatments.
highlights: Regenerative medicine (PRP and stem cell therapy)
targetAudience: People ages 30–50 experiencing chronic pain or seeking anti-aging and hormone treatments.
